crop_name: Fodder grasses (Hybrid Napier, Seteria, Guinea, Para)
recommendation: Plant rooted slips of grasses in upland areas to meet fodder needs of livestock

fertilizer: 13 quintals of compost or FYM per bigha
recommendation: Start main field preparation for paddy cultivation; Apply 13 quintals of compost or FYM per bigha of land

crop_name: Vegetable crops (sponge gourd, spine gourd, ridge gourd, cowpea, brinjal, okra)
pest_disease: fruit fly, Epilachna beetle, aphid, red pumpkin beetle, black pumpkin beetle, borers
pesticides: Emamectin Benzoate 5% SG @ 5g/10lit or Lambda Cyhalothrin 5 EC @ 3-5ml/10lit
recommendation: Spray under fair weather conditions to control pests

cause_of_damage: Flood conditions; Brahmaputra above danger level; 29 districts affected
recommendation: Sowing in upland areas free from water stagnation; Avoid flood-prone areas; Ensure drainage slope
Provide mechanical support to orchard trees; Ensure proper drainage to drain excess water

cause_of_damage: Water stagnation due to flash flood
recommendation: Avoid water accumulation in orchards; Isolate plant by digging 60cm deep, 30cm wide trench, 1m from trunk
Harvest and thresh matured Sali paddy; Continue sowing peas and lathyrus for relay cropping; Pea spacing 30cm x 10cm

fertilizer: 12 kg Urea + 30 kg SSP + 3 kg MOP (Rapeseed); 23 kg Urea + 33 kg SSP + 7 kg MOP + 1.0 kg Borax (Mustard); Apply lime 21 days prior
recommendation: Timely sowing to escape aphid; Apply FYM 3-4 quintals + fertilizers during land prep

cause_of_damage: Rain damage to nurseries; seed-borne pathogens
recommendation: Sow Green Sprouting medium @ 70-90g/bigha; Row spacing 75cm, plant spacing 45cm; Protect nurseries with temporary sheds
